text:
miwi        2009-08-13 16:41:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/p5-Text-ASCIIMathML Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                 pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Text::ASCIIMathML is a parser for ASCIIMathML text which produces
  MathML XML markup strings that are suitable for rendering by any
  MathML-compliant browser.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Text-ASCIIMathML/
  
  PR:             ports/137605
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1370    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/textproc/p5-Text-ASCIIMathML/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/p5-Text-ASCIIMathML/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/textproc/p5-Text-ASCIIMathML/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/textproc/p5-Text-ASCIIMathML/pkg-plist (new)
